title: Telangana: Transgender individual brutally lynched by mob in Nizamabad - SabrangIndia
excerpt: Telangana: Transgender individual brutally lynched by mob in Nizamabad  SabrangIndia
summary: On February 13, 2024, 50-year-old transgender person Raju was allegedly lynched by a mob in Telangana’s Nizamabad district after rumours of child kidnapping, and died from injuries despite being taken to hospital.

title: Hope for Sonia: Gang raped and attacked with acid, court orders compensation for trans woman - The News Minute
excerpt: Hope for Sonia: Gang raped and attacked with acid, court orders compensation for trans woman  The News Minute
summary: In May 2015 in Hyderabad, Sonia Sheikh, a transgender woman, was subjected to a gangrape and an acid attack.

title: This Is India’s First Transgender Web Series & Here’s Why You Should See It - ScoopWhoop
excerpt: This Is India’s First Transgender Web Series & Here’s Why You Should See It  ScoopWhoop
summary: A 25-year-old transwoman, Sonia Shaikh from Hyderabad, was brutally attacked with acid two years ago, altering her life beyond recognition but she survived.

title: Prevent attacks on transgenders in Telangana: Gig workers’ body urges govt - The Siasat Daily
excerpt: Prevent attacks on transgenders in Telangana: Gig workers’ body urges govt  The Siasat Daily
summary: A transgender person was lynched to death on July 12, 2024 in Fatehpur, with assailants video-calling other transgender persons to show the victim’s disfigured body and intimidate the community.

title: Why Safety Is Still A Distant Shore For Transgender Persons In India
summary: In 1990, 11-year-old Vyjayanti Vasanta Mogli was allegedly repeatedly raped in a school boys’ toilet by three cisgender male seniors and later a staffer, with the assaults linked to her being a trans woman, and the perpetrators faced no punishment.

title: Hijras trying to get a roof in Hyderabad caught in extortion networks - The New Indian Express
excerpt: Hijras trying to get a roof in Hyderabad caught in extortion networks  The New Indian Express
summary: Transgender/Hijra activists in Hyderabad protested against an alleged extortionist and assailant, Venkat, for physically assaulting community members including an attack on a victim with a beer bottle, while demanding his arrest despite some of his gang members being arrested.

title: Transgender woman killed by Hyderabad mob, another victim of fake WhatsApp forwards - The News Minute
excerpt: Transgender woman killed by Hyderabad mob, another victim of fake WhatsApp forwards  The News Minute
summary: In Chandrayangutta, Hyderabad, a mob attacked four transgender women after fake WhatsApp rumors led locals to believe they were kidnappers, killing one and injuring the others while police intervened.

title: Transgender woman allegedly thrashed by army men in Secunderabad, cops say they're helpless - The News Minute
excerpt: Transgender woman allegedly thrashed by army men in Secunderabad, cops say they're helpless  The News Minute
summary: Army men stationed at Parade Grounds in Secunderabad allegedly assaulted a transgender woman, beat her when she resisted, tried to strip her and attempted to rape her, and damaged her phone after she contacted police, though she received first aid and was discharged from hospital.

title: The story of a transgender woman gangraped and burnt with acid by a diabolical man who claimed to be in love with her - IBTimes India
excerpt: The story of a transgender woman gangraped and burnt with acid by a diabolical man who claimed to be in love with her  IBTimes India
summary: A transgender woman from Hyderabad was gang-raped, brutally assaulted, doused with acid, and left on the roadside after meeting men including Nadeem and a friend under the pretext of going to a party.
